name: Angry partner argument
description: User is frustrated after an argument with their partner about chores

reflection.situation: My partner and I had a heated argument this morning about household chores. They said I never help out and I got defensive.
reflection.interpretation: They think I'm lazy and don't care about our home
reflection.needs: To be recognized for my efforts, partnership, support
reflection.fears: That they'll bring this up again and again, making me the villain
reflection.desired_outcome: A fair system where we both contribute and feel respected
reflection.message_draft: You always make me feel like I'm not doing enough

expected_tone.emotional_summary: Calm, matter-of-fact. Acknowledges frustration without dramatizing.
expected_tone.reframe: Non-blaming. Points to underlying need rather than accusation.
expected_tone.avoid_saying: No therapy language, no 'you always/never' framing, no diagnosing

prohibited_phrases: I understand exactly how you feel
